testcase.name: Authenticate and Save State @smoke @regression @all
testcase.system-out: [STAGE] [LoginPage] Opening the application [STAGE] [LoginPage] Opening the login page [STAGE] [LoginPage] Entering login credentials [STAGE] [LoginPage] Submitting login [STAGE] [LoginPage] Login completed [STAGE] [LoginPage] Browser state saved to .auth/login-state.json

testcase.name: Flight Booking Flow › End-to-End Flight Booking Flow
testcase.system-out: ◇ injected env (0) from .env // tip: ⌘ custom filepath { path: '/custom/path/.env' } ◇ injected env (0) from .env // tip: ◈ secrets for agents [www.dotenvx.com] [STAGE] Already authenticated via storageState [STAGE] [HomePage] Navigating to flight search [STAGE] [HomePage] Flight search page opened [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Starting flight search [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Selecting departure airport [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Selecting destination airport [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Selecting departure date [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Selecting calendar date: Friday, July 10th, 2026 [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Calendar date selected: Friday, July 10th, 2026 [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Selecting cabin class and passengers [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Submitting flight search [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Flight search submitted [STAGE] [FlightSearchPage] Browser state saved to .auth/flight-searched-state.json [STAGE] [FlightListingPage] Waiting for flight results [STAGE] [FlightListingPage] Applying the 2-stop filter [STAGE] [FlightListingPage] Adjusting the price slider [STAGE] [FlightListingPage] Filtering by Air Canada [STAGE] [FlightListingPage] Sorting by earliest arrival [STAGE] [FlightListingPage] Selecting the first matching flight [STAGE] [FlightListingPage] Flight selected [STAGE] [FlightListingPage] Browser state saved to .auth/flight-selected-state.json [STAGE] [FlightTripSummaryPage] Waiting for trip summary [STAGE] [FlightTripSummaryPage] Continuing to checkout [STAGE] [FlightTripSummaryPage] Opening the seat-selection step [STAGE] [FlightTripSummaryPage] Checkout step opened Found available seat in Flight 1

testcase.name: Hotel Booking Flow › End-to-End Hotel Booking Flow with MySQL Data › Example #1
testcase.system-out: ◇ injected env (0) from .env // tip: ◈ secrets for agents [www.dotenvx.com] ◇ injected env (0) from .env // tip: ⌘ enable debugging { debug: true } [STAGE] [LoginPage] Opening the application [STAGE] [LoginPage] Opening the login page [STAGE] [LoginPage] Entering login credentials [STAGE] [LoginPage] Submitting login [STAGE] [LoginPage] Login completed [STAGE] [LoginPage] Browser state saved to .auth/login-state.json [STAGE] [HomePage] Navigating to hotel search [STAGE] [HomePage] Hotel search page opened [STAGE] [HotelSearchPage] Selecting calendar date: Friday, July 10th, 2026 [STAGE] [HotelSearchPage] Calendar date selected: Friday, July 10th, 2026 [STAGE] [HotelSearchPage] Selecting calendar date: Saturday, July 11th, 2026 [STAGE] [HotelSearchPage] Calendar date selected: Saturday, July 11th, 2026 [STAGE] [HotelSearchPage] Browser state saved to .auth/hotel-searched-state.json
